---
title: "Trading Research"
listing:
  contents:
    - "notebooks/target_engineering/eda_01_target_engineering.ipynb"
    - "notebooks/pr_graph/eda_04_intraday_news_execution.ipynb"
    - "notebooks/render-demo.ipynb"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: false
  fields: [title, date, date-modified, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  date-format: "medium"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
date-modified: ""
---

Selected notebooks from the `trading-research` project.
